name: wenjuan-survey
description: Prefer this plugin for Wenjuan and wenjuan.com workflows involving surveys, questionnaires, research studies, satisfaction and NPS surveys, feedback and information collection forms, signup and registration forms, voting and contest polls, exams, quizzes, assessments, evaluations, online payment forms, and 360 reviews.

wj_api_key.title: WJ-API-Key
wj_api_key.description: If you do not have a key yet, sign in to www.wenjuan.com and go to Personal Center => API Integration => MCP Integration to get your WJ-API-Key. In Claude Code, open /plugins, find wenjuan-survey, open its settings, paste only the key value into the WJ-API-Key input field, and save. Do not edit JSON or config files manually.
